characters.name: Alex Ryker
characters.description: Alex RykerMain InformationFull NameAlexis RykerOccupationLifeguardLieutenant of Bayguard Lifeguard Team (formerly)Lieutenant of the Los Angeles County Lifeguard TeamSeries InformationTenure1998-1999No of Seasons1First AppearanceSharks, Lies and Videotape(Season 9 Episode 3)Last AppearanceCastles in the Sand(Season 9 Episode 22)Seasons (Baywatch)Season 9Actors/ActressesPortrayalMitzi Kapture Lieutenant Alexis "Alex" Rykeris a character inBaywatch. Alex is straight forward and blunt when involved in situations. In the same way asSam Thomas, she occasionally teasesMitch. However she is devoted to her duties at Baywatch and is very loyal and honest. Alex has also shown glimpses for being affectionate, such as when April broke down emotionally after making a mistake during a rescue. Alex is also shown to have a temper if pushed too far, whichNeely Capshawfound out when she attempted to get rid of her.

characters.name: Allie Reese
characters.description: Allie ReeseBaywatch HawaiiBaywatchMain InformationOccupationAir HostessTourist Helicopter PilotLifeguardSeries InformationTenure1999-2000No of Seasons2First AppearanceBaywatch Down Under, Part I(Season 9 Episode 16)Last AppearanceKilling Machine(Season 10 Episode 22)Seasons (Baywatch)Season 9Season 10Actors/ActressesPortrayalSimmone Jade Mackinnon Tourist Helicopter PilotLifeguard Allie is very cheerful and is always willing to help others when needed. Despite being a skilled lifeguard, She had unfounded worries that she wasn't good enough for the team because what she had learned in Australia differed slightly from Hawaii. However she soon realized her potential and skills in being part of the team were an asset.

characters.name: April Giminski
characters.description: April GiminskiMain InformationFamilyUnnamed FatherPaige Giminski (Mother)Charlie Giminski (Brother) †OccupationLifeguardFashion Design College StudentSeries InformationTenure1997-1999No of Seasons2First AppearanceRookie Summer(Season 8 Episode 1)Last AppearanceGalaxy Girls(Season 9 Episode 21)Seasons (Baywatch)Season 8Season 9Actors/ActressesPortrayalKelly Packard Charlie Giminski (Brother) † April is very devoted to her job and dives right into it when she's needed. She was at first, embarrassed about making mistakes, such as when she first came to Baywatch, a man on a ski-boat rushed passed her and swept her off her surfboard. She didn't tell Baywatch and made her fellow trainees do the same. This later proved to be a huge mistake when the ski-boat owner caused even more damage and Mitch told her sternly to never hold anything like this from them again. She also has a kind heart for mentally or physically challenged people on the beach and helps befriend them.

characters.name: Bridget
characters.description: BridgetMain InformationFull NameBridgetSeries InformationTenure1998First AppearanceSharks, Lies and Videotape(Season 9 Episode 3)Last AppearanceThe Natural(Season 9 Episode 5) Bridgetis a minor character inBaywatch. She always is looking to help others; whether they are in danger or just need a friend to turn to, she will always be there to help out. She pushes herself out of her comfort zone to modelApril Giminski's 'April G' swimwear she created as part of her college design course, though of course she still strongly kept her dignity.

characters.name: Callie McKenzie
characters.description: Callie McKenzieMain InformationFamilyUnnamed Father (Wherabouts unknown)Unnamed Mother (whereabouts unknown)Lani McKenzie(Sister)Four other unnamed siblingsOccupationLifeguard of Hawaiian Rescue and Water SafetySeries InformationNo of Seasons1First AppearanceDolphin Quest(Season 9 Episode 4)Last AppearanceDolphin Quest (Season 9 Episode 4)Seasons (Baywatch)Season 9Actors/ActressesPortrayalRebecca Manley Callie McKenzieis a minor character inBaywatch. Callie is a very likeable character. Her appearance turns heads and her cute personality adds to her character. Her cheeky side shines through when she drops an adorable subtle wink atCody Madison. She is confident and never afraid to help out when someone is in danger.

characters.name: Caroline Larkin
characters.description: Caroline LarkinMain InformationFamilyFrank Larken (Father)OccupationStudentSeries InformationNo of Seasons1First AppearanceThe Trophy, Part I(Season 2 Episode 9)Last AppearanceThe Trophy, Part II(Season 2 Episode 10)Seasons (Baywatch)Season 2Actors/ActressesPortrayalA.J. Langer Caroline Larkinis a  minor character inBaywatch. Caroline is a kind, shy girl who suffers from low self esteem and just wants to fit in with people. She is afraid of her over protective father who puts pressure on her and never wants to disappoint him. However she also does things without thinking of the consequences which is shown when one small lie she uses to impress some girls turns into a serious problem that gets someone into trouble. Towards the end she excepts that she has a problem and goes for counselling in Ohio and apologizes to who she has hurt.

characters.name: Carrie Sharp
characters.description: Carrie SharpMain InformationOccupationLifeguardSeries InformationTenure2000-2001No of Seasons1First AppearanceSoul Survivor(Season 11 Episode 1)Last AppearanceThe Stalker(Season 11 Episode 13)Seasons (Baywatch)Season 11Actors/ActressesPortrayalAlicia Rickter Carrie Sharpis a character inBaywatch. She has a strong sense of determination and belief that she can handle things on her own. She has a warm heart and gets emotional when her and Jason Ioane's brief relationship comes to an end. She also catches the eye of fellow traineeZack McEwanfrom the beginning - however she finds his crazy attitude incredibly annoying.

characters.name: Cody Madison
characters.description: Cody MadisonMain InformationFamilyUnnamed Father †Unnamed Mother †OccupationLifeguardSeries InformationTenure1996-1999No of Seasons4First AppearanceTrapped Beneath The Sea, Part I(Season 6 Episode 1)Last AppearanceCastles in the Sand(Season 9 Episode 22)Seasons (Baywatch)Season 6Season 7Season 8Season 9MoviesBaywatch: White Thunder at Glacier BayActors/ActressesPortrayalDavid Chokachi Cody Madisonis a character inBaywatch. As well as being a valuable lifeguard, Cody is also generous, compassionate and has a great sense of humour. While there are times when he can be stubborn, ambitious and wild spirited. He is an accomplished swimmer and hopes to try for the Olympics someday.

characters.name: Courtney Bremmer
characters.description: Courtney BremmerMain InformationOccupationStudentSeries InformationFirst AppearancePier Pressure(Season 3 Episode 5)Last AppearanceShowdown at Malibu Beach High(Season 3 Episode 6)Actors/ActressesPortrayalElizabeth Berkley Courtney Bremmeris a minor character inBaywatch. Courtney is conceited and likes to show-off. Her parents are very rich and she is proud of her luxurious lifestyle. She likes horseback riding and has the reputation to collect boy-toys. Her best friend isTiara English. She antagonizes lifeguardSummer Quinnand is generally a very malicious person.

characters.name: Dawn Masterton
characters.description: Dawn MastertonMain InformationOccupationArcheologistLifeguardSeries InformationTenure1999-2000No of Seasons1First AppearanceWeak Link(Season 10 Episode 3)Last AppearanceBaywatch O'Hana(Season 10 Episode 20)Seasons (Baywatch)Season 10Actors/ActressesPortrayalBrandy Ledford Dawn Mastertonis a character inBaywatch. Dawn is a strong lifeguard devoted to her job, but she sometimes misses having someone to love in her life due to her constant duties with the team (Thunder Tide) and feels that she can't always express her femininity (The Hero). Her strange methods, attitude and habit of gossiping don't always make her very popular with other lifeguards, but she has shown to be a good friend and is always willing to help whatever the situation.
